CREATE TABLE [dbo].[capital_requests_header](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[Date] [datetime] NULL,
	[Plant] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[PlantId] [int] NULL,
	[Fertigungsnummer] [int] NULL,
	[Artikelnummer] [nvarchar](25) NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[StatusId] [int] NULL,
	[CloseDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[UserId] [int] NULL,
	[UserName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[capital_requests_log](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[IdRequest] [int] NULL,
	[Plant] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[PlantId] int NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[StatusId] int NULL,
	[IdPosition] [int] NULL,
	[Changes] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[User] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[DateTime] [datetime] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[capital_requests_positions](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[PositionId] [int] NULL,
	[HeaderId] [int] NULL,
	[IncidentCategoryId] [int] NULL,
	[IncidentCategory] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[IncidentDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[IncidentDescription] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CapitalReply] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CapitalStatus] [bit] NULL,
	[CapitalDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[CapitalBOM] [bit] NULL,
	[CapitalCP] [bit] NULL,
	[CapitalFB] [bit] NULL,
	[CapitalDOC] [bit] NULL,
	[CapitalClose] [bit] NULL,
	[EngeneeringValidation] [bit] NULL,
	[EngeneeringValidationDate] [datetime] NULL
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[capital_requests_teams](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[UserId] [int] NULL,
	[Username] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[PlantId] [int] NULL,
	[Team] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[AddUser] [int] NULL,
	[AddTime] [datetime] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__CPL_AccessProfile](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[ModuleActivated] [bit] NULL,
	[AccessProfileName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[RequestCreation] [bit] NULL,
	[RequestCapital] [bit] NULL,
	[RequestEngeneering] [bit] NULL,
	[RequestAdmin] [bit] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__CPL_AccessProfileUsers](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[AccessProfileId] [int] NULL,
	[AccessProfileName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[UserId] [int] NULL,
	[UserName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[UserEmail] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CreationTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
)
